---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the Trivia Broadcast Engine
title: ''
labels: enhancement, needs triage
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.
Example: *"I'm unable to easily reset scores between rounds without restarting the server."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see. How should it work from a host or audience perspective?

- What new button, view, or behavior do you envision?
- How would the host interact with it?
- How would the audience see it (if at all)?

## Use Case

Explain the real-world scenario where this would be useful for a live trivia game:

- **Game type:** e.g. pub quiz, classroom, family game night, corporate event
- **Host setup:** Single screen, dual screen (broadcast + dashboard), or helpers
- **Frequency:** Would this be used every game, or only occasionally?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workarounds you've tried or alternative designs you've thought about.

- Could this be done with existing features?
- Is there a CLI flag or config option that partially addresses this?

## Mockups / References

If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or links to similar features in other trivia/quiz software.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to confirm this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature would benefit more than just my specific setup
- [ ] I am willing to help test this feature if implemented
